brand.tagline: Fair feed — traded on the honest scale

hero.kicker: Fair feed — traded on the honest scale
hero.title: Your day's price, from the field.
hero.subtitle: Daily feed-grain prices from Alexandria & Damietta ports and major wholesalers — trusted, updated before your day starts. Web, Telegram bot, and API — one source for every mill and farm in Egypt.

features.title: Everything you need to price your day.
features.lead: From your morning phone check, to a bot that replies in-chat, to an API feeding your ERP — one source, one timestamp.
features.liveDesc: Daily table of 8 commodities across 4 sources, compared to yesterday and last week, with charts up to one year back.
features.alertsDesc: Want to know when corn crosses 14,500? Set the threshold, pick email or Telegram — Makayeel wakes you.
features.botDesc: /price corn → price, delta, source in one tap. /chart corn 30 → chart image delivered.
features.apiDesc: Private API key, 60 requests/minute, direct integration with your ERP or internal exchange.

cta.title: Start your day with the right price.
cta.subtitle: Join 1,200+ traders and farmers already relying on Makayeel for daily decisions.
cta.button: Sign up free — no card required

prices.pageLead: Every commodity, every source — updated today.

pricing.title: Pick what fits your business.
pricing.lead: Free for casual watchers. Pro for traders and farmers. Enterprise for mills and supply chains.

pro.name: Pro
pro.waitlist: Coming soon — leave your email and we'll notify you when Pro launches.

auth.loginLead: Enter your email and we'll send a magic link.
auth.signupLead: Free to sign up. One watchlist, unlimited alerts.
auth.linkSentBody: Check your inbox and click the link to sign in.
auth.termsAccept: By signing up, you agree to the Terms and Privacy Policy.
